summary: Verified all 4 features: (1) Tags Strip on Contact Page - PASS: New TAGS section with orange tag icon, horizontal scrollable chips (Birthday, Out of State, Hot Lead, Sold Date, Anniversary), and blue '+' button visible between stats line and AUTOMATIONS section. (2) Tags Strip Add Button - Code verified at line 1321, uses showTagPicker modal (same as iteration_92 test). (3) Contacts Page Tag Search - PASS: Backend API correctly returns contacts when searching by tag name. Frontend search field with 'Birthday' query shows Forest Ward. (4) Contacts Page Tag Filter Bar - PASS: Horizontal tag filter bar with chips (All, Follow Up, Hot Lead, New Customer, Out of State, Service Due, VIP) visible below search field.

tags_strip_on_contact_page.section_visible: PASS - TAGS section with orange tag icon visible
tags_strip_on_contact_page.section_position: PASS - Between stats line (125 touches · 46 msgs · 1 campaigns · 0 referrals) and AUTOMATIONS section
tags_strip_on_contact_page.horizontal_scroll: PASS - Tags displayed as horizontal chips with ScrollView
tags_strip_on_contact_page.tag_chips_visible: PASS - Birthday, Out of State (green), Hot Lead (orange), Sold Date (green), Anniversary (pink) chips shown
tags_strip_on_contact_page.add_button_visible: PASS - Blue '+' button visible on right side of TAGS header

tags_strip_add_button.code_implementation: PASS - TouchableOpacity at line 1321 with onPress={() => { loadTags(); setShowTagPicker(true); }}
tags_strip_add_button.modal_opens: VERIFIED in iteration_92 - Opens 'Select Tag' modal with search and available tags

contacts_page_tag_search.backend_api: PASS - 10/10 pytest tests passed for tag search API
contacts_page_tag_search.search_birthday: PASS - Searching 'Birthday' in contacts search field returns Forest Ward
contacts_page_tag_search.search_hot_lead: PASS - API returns Forest Ward for 'Hot Lead' search
contacts_page_tag_search.search_sold_date: PASS - API returns Forest Ward for 'Sold Date' search
contacts_page_tag_search.search_partial_match: PASS - Partial tag search 'Birth' works via regex
contacts_page_tag_search.search_nonexistent: PASS - Non-existent tag search correctly excludes contacts

contacts_page_tag_filter_bar.filter_bar_visible: PASS - Horizontal tag filter bar below search field
contacts_page_tag_filter_bar.chips_visible: PASS - All, Follow Up, Hot Lead 3, New Customer, Out of State 1, Service Due, VIP chips shown
contacts_page_tag_filter_bar.chip_count_badges: PASS - Chips show contact counts (e.g., 'Hot Lead 3', 'Out of State 1')

verified_features.tags_strip: New TAGS section added to contact detail page between stats and AUTOMATIONS, with horizontal scrollable tag chips and '+' button to add tags
verified_features.backend_tag_search: GET /api/contacts/{user_id}?search=<tag_name> now matches contacts by tag name via {tags: {$regex: search, $options: 'i'}} in contacts.py line 136
verified_features.frontend_tag_search: Search field on Contacts page sends query to backend which now matches tag names
verified_features.tag_filter_bar: Horizontal filter bar with tag chips for quick filtering on Contacts page

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 features verified working: (1) TAGS strip on contact detail page with horizontal tag chips and '+' button between stats and AUTOMATIONS sections. (2) '+' button opens showTagPicker modal (code verified at line 1321). (3) Backend tag search working - contacts API now matches by tag name via regex. (4) Tag filter bar on contacts page with chips for quick filtering. Forest Ward contact has tags: Birthday, Sold Date, Anniversary, Out of State, Hot Lead. Note: data-testid attributes don't render in DOM for React Native Web - use coordinate or text-based selectors.

mocked_api.twilio_sms: MOCKED - Personal SMS flow opens native SMS app instead of sending via Twilio
